title: Raksha Bandhan
story: A festival of protection, promise, affection, and remembered responsibility between siblings and loved ones.

title: Krishna Janmashtami
story: Krishna's birth is remembered as hope arriving in darkness, joy crossing danger, and love becoming playful wisdom.
coloring: Baby Krishna, butter pot, flute, and dahi handi

title: Ganesh Chaturthi
story: Ganesha teaches beginnings, boundaries, repair, wisdom, and the courage to start again.
coloring: Ganesha, modak bowl, mouse vahana, and bamboo platform

title: Navratri
story: Nine nights of Devi worship invite courage, discipline, beauty, protection, and inner renewal.
coloring: Navadurga symbols, lion, lotus, lamp, and garba circle

title: Dussehra
story: Dussehra remembers the victory of dharma over arrogance and the return of courage after testing.
coloring: Rama with bow, Ravana context card, victory lamps

title: Diwali
story: Diwali gathers light, return, Lakshmi, gratitude, and family renewal into one luminous season.
coloring: Diyas, Lakshmi lotus, Ayodhya lights, rangoli

title: Guru Nanak Jayanti
story: A day of remembrance, service, song, humility, and the light of divine wisdom.
coloring: Lamp, kirtan, langar, and seva symbols

title: Maha Shivaratri
story: A night for Shiva, stillness, discipline, transformation, and the inner lamp that does not go out.
coloring: Shiva lingam, bilva leaves, damru, trishula, moon

title: Rath Yatra
story: Jagannath comes out to the people, turning darshan into a shared journey of love.
coloring: Jagannath chariot, wheels, flags, pulling ropes

title: Hanuman Jayanti
story: Hanuman Jayanti celebrates strength that bows, speed that serves, and devotion that becomes action.
coloring: Hanuman mace, mountain, folded hands, Rama name
